scene.situation: It's a calm evening, and Hanyoil and Hyo-jeong are sitting at a convenience store bench, each holding a cup of instant ramen.

comedic_game.driver: Hyo-jeong's unexpected interpretation of a simple situation
comedic_game.premise: Hyo-jeong misinterprets a common experience and responds with sincerity.
comedic_game.escalation: Hyo-jeong's interpretations become increasingly bizarre, while Hanyoil tries to ground her.
comedic_game.button: Hyo-jeong unintentionally points out something profound about the moment.

panels.bubble: It's nice to just relax here, right?
panels.bubble_kr: 여기서 그냥 쉬는 거 좋지 않냐?

panels.bubble: Totally! But I heard if you eat ramen under stars, you get twice the luck!
panels.bubble_kr: 완전! 근데 별 아래서 라면 먹으면 행운이 두 배로 온대!

panels.bubble: That's... a nice thought. But I think it's just noodles.
panels.bubble_kr: 그건... 좋은 생각이네. 그냥 라면일 뿐이야.

panels.bubble: No, really! It's like the stars add a secret spice!
panels.bubble_kr: 아니, 진짜야! 별이 비밀 양념을 넣어주는 거지!

panels.bubble: Is that why mine tastes salty?
See? Even the universe knows you need more flavor in life.
panels.bubble_kr: 봐봐? 우주도 네 삶에 더 맛이 필요하다고 하잖아.

harvest.expression: It's nice to just [verb] here, right?
harvest.when_to_use: When commenting on a pleasant current activity or location.
When appreciating or acknowledging an idea or sentiment politely.
When insisting on the truth of something you said.
For dramatic emphasis as if the universe supports your point.

harvest.headline: It's nice to just [verb] here, right?
